entities.name: SULFUR
entities.description: A chemical element whose deficiency is widespread in rainfed systems of India

entities.name: SULFUR DEFICIENCY
entities.description: The state of insufficient sulfur in soils

entities.name: CALCIUM CHLORIDE
entities.description: A chemical extractant used to determine available sulfur in soils

entities.name: CALCIUM PHOSPHATE
entities.description: A chemical extractant used to determine available sulfur in soils

entities.name: SOIL PH
entities.description: The measure of acidity or alkalinity of the soil, which affects the extractability of sulfate-S

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the rainfed systems and soil samples were located

entities.name: ICP-AES
entities.description: Inductively Coupled Plasma Atomic Emission Spectroscopy used to determine sulfur in extracts

entities.name: EXTRACTABLE SULFUR
entities.description: The portion of sulfur in soil that can be removed by chemical extractants

entities.name: SEMIARID TROPICAL REGIONS
entities.description: Regions characterized by specific climate and soil pH ranges where Ca chloride can replace Ca phosphate
